title: Row and column names disappear when "Hide Controls" is selected.
excerpt:

posts.author: SamG1 (Sam Grubbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Currently having an issue where every time I select “Hide controls” in my pivot board, all the column and row labels disappear, so I have no idea what the table is actually displaying! This is an issue because I have 8 different boards in this table, so there are over 15 lines of parameters in the control section! Its making the pivot board unusable either way.

image1506×526 11.3 KB

When I uncheck the box, it works just fine and I can see my data. I have tried restarting my PC and Monday.com itself, but nothing has worked yet. Thanks!
